commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a tool-result `directReply` flag and helpers, wires embedded-agent abort support, emits tool text/media through block replies, treats `direct_reply` aborts as successful, adds tests/changelog, and includes QA/test-stability fixes.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level for the blocking review finding. A successful text directReply with block streaming disabled, or any `sourceReplyDeliveryMode: "message_tool_only"` turn, reaches the new abort path before current delivery code has guaranteed visible output.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer/product review for the direct-delivery policy; automation cannot supply the contributor's setup proof.
